---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this related to a problem?**
A description of what the problem is. e.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the Feature**
A clear description of what you'd like added or changed.

**Use Case**
How would you use this feature? What problem does it solve?

**Alternatives Considered**
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Screenshots, links to similar features in other firewalls (OPNsense, pfSense, etc), or any other context.
